UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Information about a user stored in the system, retrieved from Google authentication.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the user (matching Firebase Auth uid)

joinedDate.description: Sign up date formatted as YYYY-MM-DD

UserFeedback.title: UserFeedback
UserFeedback.description: Feedback, questions or issue submissions provided by signed-in users.

category.description: Categorization of feedback (feedback, question, bug, suggestion)

screenshot.description: Optional Base64 encoded screenshot data string

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp of when the feedback was sent

/users/{userId}.description: User account documents containing climate dashboard settings and profiles

/feedback/{feedbackId}.description: A collection containing feedback items, screenshot uploads, and inquiries from users
